title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Cancel
scenario: Location permission popup with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" appears in Find My Device after declining location sharing during onboarding; tapping Cancel returns to Poly Lens Menu
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and begin onboarding.
2. When the Location Sharing dialogue appears, tap "Don't Allow".
3. Complete onboarding and navigate to the Home screen.
4. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) to open the Poly Lens Menu.
5. Tap "Find My Device" under App Settings.
6. Observe the permission popup that appears with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options.
expected: Tapping "Cancel" should dismiss the popup and remain on the Find My Device screen within the app.
